basics.name: Byungwoo Yoo
basics.label: CTO / Software Engineer
basics.summary: Inspired by my professor's words, 'You should dedicate yourself to the country and its people because you received the best education at a lower cost,' I have been driven to make people's lives more convenient worldwide. As a core developer of LINE Messenger, used by 600 million people globally, and through my startup experience in the US and my role as AI Lab Lead at a top EdTech company in Korea, I am currently serving as CTO at Datarize.

work.name: Datarize
highlights: Led the company-wide AX transition and AI hackathon, resulting in the release of three AI products
Hired and onboarded general and special development positions (JS SDK Engineer, AI Engineer, etc.)

work.name: Mathpresso
work.position: VP of Engineering / AI Lab Lead
work.summary: Operator of QANDA, an AI-based math problem-solving search platform
highlights: Developed and led the business of AI digital textbooks used by Mirae N, Visang, and YBM (2023.02 – present)
Led multiple AI research projects (ML, search, calculator & DB) (2021.02 – 2023.02)
Redesigned search and ML services based on domain-driven design, reducing infrastructure costs by over 50%

work.name: Kasa Korea
work.summary: Operator of Kasa, a blockchain-based real estate revenue investment and trading platform
highlights: Developed and reviewed various functions of the API server and trading engine

work.name: Buzzvil
work.summary: Operator of Buzzscreen, the world's largest smartphone lock screen advertising platform (used by over 2 million people daily)
highlights: Developed the ad and content allocation logic for Buzzscreen
Optimized the search service, reducing infrastructure costs to a quarter and providing faster responses
As a software architect, guided other engineers to build robust and sustainable microservices using Clean Architecture and DDD without service downtime

work.name: Slidejoy
highlights: Reached break-even point and secured investment before being acquired (reported by TechCrunch)
Designed and developed the service using ad networks and client development, and transitioned the backend to Spring Boot

work.name: NAVER
highlights: Improved transmission rates (75% → 99.5%) as the developer in charge of NNI (NHN Notification Infra), a core library of LINE, and gained experience with multiple overseas trips and on-site debugging
Developed and contributed to the Android version of the global network library Netty as open-source
Introduced software design (MVP) that enables multiple developers to collaborate effectively, significantly enhancing team performance

work.name: InfoBank / Dojeonhaneun Saramdeul
work.summary: Worked at InfoBank and Dojeonhaneun Saramdeul as an alternative to military service
highlights: Participated in the development of m&Talk and Samsung ChatON

education.area: Department of Electrical Engineering (double major in Business Administration)
